design_intent: Art Deco Revival living room with deep jewel tones, velvet upholstery, lacquered surfaces, brass hardware, and bold geometric symmetry; glamorous, tailored, and slightly dramatic.

selected_pieces.product_name: BEAUTYPEAK Wavy Round Aluminum Framed Bathroom Vanity Mirrors 24"x24",Black
selected_pieces.placement_note: Centered on the main wall above the sofa, aligned to create a symmetrical focal point and reflect the brass finishes and evening lamplight.

selected_pieces.product_name: JIONJOY 28 x 28 Metal Round Wall Mirror- Gold
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hung as a paired mirror element on the opposite side of the focal wall, or layered in a gallery arrangement to reinforce the room’s geometric symmetry and brass accent story.

selected_pieces.product_name: Glam Decorative Ceramic Leaf Bud Vase for Room and Office Decor, White and Gold, 6 L x 6 W x 8 H Inches
selected_pieces.placement_note: Placed on the coffee table as a compact sculptural accent, slightly off-center, with a single dramatic stem to soften the hard lines of the metallic and lacquered surfaces.

selected_pieces.product_name: Manila Round Hammered Drum Coffee Table Brass - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Placed centered in front of the seating area, leaving a clear perimeter walkway; its hammered brass drum form acts as the room’s metallic centerpiece and echoes Art Deco glamour.

selected_pieces.product_name: 7'X10' Vintage Tufted Distressed Area Rug Tan - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Anchored under the sofa and coffee table with generous borders visible on all sides, laying a quiet base so the jewel-toned upholstery and brass details read more vividly.
